title: Deal Brief
description: Schema-validated output for the SPA Contract-to-Cash deal brief synthesis node.

recommendation.description: Overall recommendation: APPROVE, HOLD, or REJECT, with one-sentence rationale.
examples: HOLD — do not execute. Critical deviations on escrow, jurisdiction, and statutory warranty require SEVC sign-off.

authority_routing.description: Which approval tier is required per the HOD→FC→SEVC matrix and why.
examples: SEVC + Legal + Compliance — deviations touch escrow, governing law, and statutory warranties.

findings.description: Severity-ranked list of all findings from clause deviation, payment validation, KYC/AML, and compliance checks.

id.description: Finding identifier, e.g. D1, P2, K3.
examples: D1
P1
K2

area.description: Which verification domain surfaced this finding.

description.description: Clear, concise description of the deviation or issue.

citation.description: Source citation — exact clause reference in both deal and standard documents where applicable.
examples: Deal Cl. 5 vs Standard Cl. 5 (Law No. 8 of 2007 escrow requirement absent)

routes_to.description: Which authority tier this finding routes to per the HOD→FC→SEVC matrix.
examples: SEVC + Legal
FC
Compliance

stated_total_pct.description: Percentage total as stated in the payment plan.

computed_total_pct.description: Percentage total recomputed by the validator.

down_payment_stated_pct.description: Down payment percentage as stated in the schedule.

down_payment_computed_pct.description: Down payment percentage recomputed from the stated AED amount.

examples: Schedule totals 98% — 2% / AED 130,000 unallocated
Down payment AED 1,250,000 = 19.23%, not 20%
Source of funds not provided
Name mismatch: SPA 'John A. Smith' vs passport 'John Andrew Smithe'
Sanctions/PEP screening not run

suggested_redlines.description: Specific redline corrections required before the deal can proceed.
examples: Cl. 5: Restore mandatory escrow clause referencing project escrow account and Dubai Law No. 8 of 2007.
Cl. 13: Replace Seychelles jurisdiction with Dubai Courts (or DIFC Courts where agreed in writing).
Cl. 9: Correct structural DLP from 5 years to 10 years (mandatory under UAE law).
Cl. 7: Cap delay penalty at 1% per month, maximum 10% of amounts paid.
Cl. 4: Reinstate DLD Oqood interim-registration clause.
Payment plan: Correct to 100% total; increase down payment to AED 1,300,000 (20%).
